<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#ABCDEF;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#ABCDEF;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a player that has been tagged as retired. Any featured information is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

'''Strider''' (later known as '''Uthar''') (active in 2003 - 2005) was a leader of [[Heh|heh]] and later [[42]] clan as well as a big contributor of LieroX files.

== List of files ==
=== Levels ===
* Brick
* Cave Drawing
* Cave Mirrored
* Cheese2
* Compressed
* DownTown2
* Gears2
* GU

=== Mods ===
* Instagib v0.1
* [[Liero 1.11|Liero v1.11]] (with [[HocusPocus]])
* Shock v1.40 Air

=== Skins ===
* AimMan
* BattleShredderA
* BattleShredderB
* BattleTankA
* BattleTankB
* BattleTruckA
* BattleTruckB
* EhBandBlue
* EhDarkestGun
* EhDarkGun
* EhBandGreen
* EhBandRed
* EhEyeGreen
* EhEyeRed
* EhMarineBrown
* EhMarineGreen
* Enhanced
* HankeyA
* HankeyB
* LieroXBrownA
* LieroXBrownB
* LieroXGreenA
* LieroXGreenB
* R2D2
* R2D2EyeGreen
* R2D2EyeRed
* SnailA
* SnailB
* SnailC
* Snowman
* SpaceManA
* SpaceManB
* SpaceManC
* SpaceManD
* Worms1Eh
* Worms1EhADark
* Worms1EhBDark
* Worms1EhCDark

=== Other files ===
* Background
* Crosshairs
* Enhanced Sound Effects

[[Category:Players]]
[[Category:Retired players]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721162448/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Strider -->
